runs.text: Congratulations on your recent clean beauty purchase from ILIA. You're now protecting and reviving your skin with beauty that breaks the cycle. Way to go!

blockMeta.name: Our formulas are made with a…

runs.text: Our formulas are made with active levels of skincare ingredients, so your skin looks and feels better with each wear.

blockMeta.name: We carry the Leaping Bunny c…

runs.text: We carry the Leaping Bunny certification which means none of our products are tested on our furry friends.
Our sustainable packaging uses recycled aluminum, glass components and responsibly sourced paper.
U.S. customers can send us 5 empties per month to be recycled responsibly, so they don't end up in a landfill.
